title: armeria maritima subsp. barcensis
intro: Armeria maritima subsp. barcensis, a subspecies of the Sea Thrift plant, is a flowering perennial native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its rich content of flavonoids, saponins, and terpenoids, which possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antidiabetic and antimicrobial activities. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal use, and is also used in homeopathic remedies.
